zh.lifeSummary: Gwenillian ferch Cydifor是Cydifor ap Gwgon的女兒，於1265年出生在英國英格蘭。她和Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr至少有12個兒子和4個女兒。她去世在英國英格蘭素斯 越可爾威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gwenillian ferch Cydifor是Cydifor ap Gwgon的女儿，于1265年出生在英国英格兰。她和Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr至少有12个儿子和4个女儿。她去世在英国英格兰素斯 越可爾威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenillian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: Gwenillian ferch Cydifor was born in 1265, in England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Cydifor ap Gwgon. She had at least 12 sons and 4 daughters with Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr. She died in Wales, South Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenillian ferch Cydiforは1265年にイギリスイギリスでCydifor ap Gwgonの娘として生まれた。彼女はCadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawrとの間に少なくとも12人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスソウス ヨークシュアイアワレスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenillian ferch Cydifor(은)는 1265년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Cydifor ap Gwgon의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 월스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Gwenillian ferch Cydifor родилась в 1265 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Cydifor ap Gwgon. У неё было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 4 дочери от Cadwgan Fychan ap Cadwgon ap Fawr. Она умерла в местности веилесь, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
